title: Better Stack Count
description: configure stack count text, such as size/ colour/ background
body:
## simple mod to configure stack count text

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43323db32d3ff3c207d6d65e49bf9bdb8946943b.png)

![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82758822c088ab2429469585dddb965e93af9c76.png)


**current configurations:**
- change size
- change colour
- change position
- add background
- background colour
- show durability (actual/ percentage) of tools

**project state:**
- still in development
- will try to support latest minecraft version as quick as possible
- report bug to discord or github issues

**planning:**
- custom texture (from .ttf in custom resource pack)
